preview.prebuildCommand: if [ "$EAS_BUILD_PLATFORM" = "ios" ]; then echo $GOOGLE_SERVICE_INFO_PLIST | base64 --decode > GoogleService-Info.plist; fi && npx expo prebuild --clean

production.prebuildCommand: if [ "$EAS_BUILD_PLATFORM" = "ios" ]; then echo $GOOGLE_SERVICE_INFO_PLIST | base64 --decode > GoogleService-Info.plist; fi && npx expo prebuild --clean
